name: Apple Strudel (Apfelstrudel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and salt together.
2. Cut in the 2 tablespoons shortening and add the eggs and water. Mix well.
3. Knead the dough thoroughly, then roll it out on a floured surface until it blisters.
4. Place the dough under a cloth in a warm place for about 20 minutes to rest.
5. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
6. On a large, lightly floured work surface, carefully roll the dough out to the thickness of tissue paper.
7. Spread the apple mixture evenly over the dough: sliced apples, melted butter, raisins, nuts, brown sugar, cinnamon, and grated lemon rind.
8. Fold in the edges of the dough and roll up tightly into a log about 4 inches wide.
9. Place the strudel on a baking sheet and brush with beaten egg (optional for a golden finish).
10. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 10 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 400°F (200°C) and continue baking for another 20 minutes until golden brown.
11. Let cool slightly before slicing into portions about 2 inches wide.
Note: Ensure all utensils are clean and dry before use to avoid any contamination or accidents while handling hot dough or sharp objects during rolling and cutting.
